summary: Full E2E testing of GenStudio AI Generation Suite completed. Text-to-Image and Text-to-Video work correctly with real AI generation. Style Profiles creation works. Image-to-Video has a CRITICAL BUG - the image_to_video method doesn't exist in OpenAIVideoGeneration class. Video Remix was not fully tested due to time constraints but uses text_to_video as fallback.

critical.issue: CRITICAL: 'OpenAIVideoGeneration' object has no attribute 'image_to_video'. The method doesn't exist in the emergentintegrations library. Returns 500 Internal Server Error.
critical.error_message: GenStudio image-to-video error: 'OpenAIVideoGeneration' object has no attribute 'image_to_video'
critical.fix_suggestion: Check emergentintegrations library documentation for correct method name or implement fallback using text_to_video with image context

issues: Generated images/videos show as dark placeholders when files have expired (15-min limit) - this is expected behavior but could show a clearer 'Expired' overlay

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Image-to-Video endpoint - the image_to_video method doesn't exist in OpenAIVideoGeneration class. Need to check emergentintegrations library for correct method or implement alternative approach
Verify Video Remix endpoint works correctly (uses text_to_video as fallback, may not actually remix the uploaded video)
critical_code_review_comments: Image-to-Video (line 3880): Calls video_gen.image_to_video() which doesn't exist in OpenAIVideoGeneration class
Video Remix (line 4028): Uses text_to_video as fallback - doesn't actually process the uploaded video, just generates new video from prompt
seed_data_creation: Created 'Luxury Brand Style' style profile for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: GenStudio testing completed. Text-to-Image (Gemini) and Text-to-Video (Sora 2) work correctly. Style Profiles work. Image-to-Video is BROKEN due to missing method. Video Remix uses text_to_video fallback. Credits: Started with 100, ended with 40 (60 credits used: 2x text-to-image=20, 2x text-to-video=20, 1x style-profile=20).

genstudio_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads correctly with all 5 tools, stats, templates, and recent generations

text_to_image.details: Successfully generated image with prompt 'A cute corgi puppy sitting in a field of sunflowers'. Generation took ~50 seconds. Credits deducted correctly (10 credits). Download works within 15-min window.

text_to_video.details: Successfully generated video with prompt 'A butterfly landing on a flower in slow motion'. Generation took ~80 seconds. Credits deducted correctly (10 credits). Video plays in browser.

image_to_video.details: CRITICAL BUG: Returns 500 error. The image_to_video method doesn't exist in OpenAIVideoGeneration class from emergentintegrations library.

video_remix.details: Not fully tested. Code shows it uses text_to_video as fallback rather than actually remixing the uploaded video.

style_profiles.details: Successfully created 'Luxury Brand Style' profile with description and tags. Credits deducted correctly (20 credits).

history.details: Shows all generations with correct types, statuses, and dates. Filter dropdown works. 15-minute expiry notice displayed.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Image-to-Video endpoint returns 500 Internal Server Error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The code at line 3880 in server.py calls video_gen.image_to_video() but this method doesn't exist in the OpenAIVideoGeneration class from emergentintegrations library
reproduction_steps: 4. Enter motion prompt and check consent
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Check emergentintegrations library documentation for correct method name. If image_to_video doesn't exist, consider using text_to_video with image context or implementing a different approach.
